description.ko: 인공위성 시점에서 산맥, 강줄기, 사막의 모래 언덕이 만들어내는 복잡한 패턴을 포착한 지구 표면의 고해상도 항공 탐사 영상입니다.
description.en: A high-resolution aerial exploration of the Earth's surface, capturing the intricate patterns of mountain ranges, river veins, and desert dunes from a satellite perspective.

prompt: Ultra-high resolution satellite photography of Earth texture, intricate tectonic plates, deep mountain ridges, winding river deltas resembling veins, golden hour lighting, cinematic aerial view, 8k resolution, hyper-realistic, geological patterns, natural color palette.
